description: MCP server for Talos Linux — resources, services, logs, health, config, lifecycle via gRPC.
name: io.github.Nosmoht/talos-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Context name override (default: active context from config)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_CONTEXT

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to disable all mutating tools (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: If set (e.g. ":8080"), serve Streamable HTTP instead of stdio
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_HTTP_ADDR

environmentVariables.description: Required bearer token when HTTP mode is active (TALOS_MCP_HTTP_ADDR is set)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated IPs, hostnames, and CIDR ranges permitted as tool targets. Unset or empty allows all nodes.
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_ALLOWED_NODES

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated path prefixes permitted for talos_read_file and talos_list_files (e.g. /etc,/proc). Unset or empty allows all paths.
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_ALLOWED_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to bypass upgrade path validation (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_SKIP_VERSION_CHECK

environmentVariables.description: HTTP mode: token-bucket refill rate in requests/second (float, default: 10)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_RATE_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: HTTP mode: token-bucket burst capacity (int, default: 20)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_RATE_BURST

environmentVariables.description: HTTP mode: max POST request body size in bytes (int, default: 4194304 = 4 MiB)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_MAX_BODY_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: HTTP mode: max concurrent POST handlers; returns 503 on overload (int, default: 20)
environmentVariables.name: TALOS_MCP_MAX_CONCURRENT

title: Talos Linux MCP Server
